rationale: Package is valuable, scope-clean, and deterministic in its own model
Load-bearing FC triggers exceed executable evidence on REV-001..006 axes
REV-007 narrower findings independently confirmed and should be preserved
Not accepted as economic gate result; PR #35 remains draft
Charity-bound migration receipt concept not shown incoherent
Transferability not necessary for charity+receipt functions
Transferability necessity for full ledger functions remains open until functions specified
Caps/concavity without identity fail; linear pro-rata preserves whales
Stolen-key pathway residual remains; profitable laundering is assumption-conditional
Rebate incidence is conditional; not unconditional behavioral destruction
Governance capture conditional on integration rule
conditions: Specify target ledger functions before defending transferability
Prefer non-transferable or delayed-transfer claim if float not required
Do not default majority governance to raw allocation
If governance linked, use continuous caps or nontransferable gov
Do not sell concave/cap fairness without identity layer
Model stolen-fund economics with opportunity cost, not legal basis alone
Treat rebates as residual social/legal surface with access frictions
Use neutral floating-ratio wording; defer legal classification to Track F
Consider sealed/precommitment for denominator timing risk
